description_short: A cooling orthopedic pillow with dual height options, designed to reduce pressure on your neck and head. Made with real perforated memory foam, this pillow provides consistent support without sagging, breaking or flattening.

construction_layers.name: Pillow Fill
construction_layers.notes: Doesn't sag or break. Cervical contour shape with dual loft options.

proprietary_tech.name: CoolTEC™ Fabric
proprietary_tech.description: Improves airflow and keeps you up to 4° cooler.

proprietary_tech.name: Dual Loft Design
proprietary_tech.description: Higher loft for side sleepers, lower loft for back sleepers.

faq_specs.question: What are the benefits of the dual loft options?
faq_specs.answer: The higher loft supports side sleepers while the lower loft cradles back sleepers.

faq_specs.question: What do you mean by hyperextension?
faq_specs.answer: It enables your neck muscles to stretch and provides relief.

faq_specs.question: What do you mean by neutral spine position?
faq_specs.answer: It's where your head and neck are aligned under the least stress.
